item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
files=$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
test \""'$files" = "$expected"
printf '"'artifact_file_count=2 PASS\\n'
printf '%s\\n' \""'$files"
jq -e '"'keys == [\"batch_size\",\"dry_run_first\",\"owner\",\"rollback_error_rate\",\"safety_conditions\",\"schema_version\",\"strategy\"]' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'json_exact_key_set=PASS\\n'
printf 'BOUNDED_SHAPE_CHECK=PASS\\n'"
